sources.name: Marketing Skills (Corey Haines)
evidence: 37.4k stars, 30 contributors, 22 releases (latest v2.6.0 2026-07-02)
32+ SKILL.md files under skills/ directory, each with YAML frontmatter (name, description, metadata)

Covers 7 sub-domains: SEO & Content (seo-audit, ai-seo, site-architecture, programmatic-seo, schema-markup, content-strategy), CRO (page-cro, signup-flow-cro, form-cro, popup-cro, onboarding-cro, paywall-upgrade-cro), Content & Copy (copywriting, copy-editing, cold-email, email-sequence, social-content), Paid & Measurement (paid-ads, ad-creative, ab-test-setup, analytics-tracking), Growth & Retention (referral-program, free-tool-strategy, churn-prevention, community), Sales & GTM (revops, sales-enablement, launch-strategy, pricing-strategy, competitor-alternatives), Strategy (marketing-ideas, marketing-psychology, customer-research, product-marketing-context)
Product-marketing-context skill acts as shared foundation read by all other skills first
Follows Agent Skills spec with strict naming conventions, <500 line SKILL.md, optional references/scripts/assets directories
Also ships 51 zero-dependency CLI tools (tools/clis/), Composio integration layer, and Claude Code plugin marketplace manifest
Last push 2026-07-08 — actively maintained

sources.name: Claude Marketing (Rebecca Rae Barton)
evidence: 68 stars, MIT license, 56 open-source Claude Code skills
Each skill ships three layers: SKILL.md (frameworks and decision trees), REFERENCE.md (benchmarks, API schemas, rate limits), EXAMPLES.md (worked prompts with expected output)

Covers 10 skill categories: Paid Media (9 skills — Google Ads, Meta Ads, Microsoft Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok Ads, cross-platform audit, account structure, competitor ads, wasted spend), SEO & AI Search (6 skills — AEO/GEO optimizer, technical SEO audit, schema markup, programmatic SEO, SEO content writer, llms.txt), Content (6 skills — copywriting frameworks, content pipeline, content creator, social media strategy, email composer, content workflow), Growth & Conversion (3 skills — CRO auditor with LIFT model, landing page optimizer, retention & churn prevention), Strategy & Research (8 skills — market research, ICP research, pricing strategy, customer journey, brand DNA, brand voice, cold email, research digest), Email & Lifecycle (3 skills — Klaviyo analyst, Klaviyo developer, Braze), Analytics (6 skills — Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Looker Studio, Shopify analytics, A/B testing, UTM & attribution), Creative & Design (3 skills — frontend design, tech diagram, Remotion video), Reporting (4 skills — pro deck builder, pro report builder, data viz deck, HTML report builder), DevOps (8 skills — GitHub README, repo health, repo scaffold, sync repos, dep audit, release notes, social preview, safe push)
Plus 3 specialized agents, 6 skill packs, GA4-to-GTM pipeline
Implementation-grade tools tested in real client engagements; scored audits with 150+ weighted checks and A-F health grades
Created 2026-02-09, last push 2026-05-14

sources.name: PM Skills Marketplace (phuryn)
evidence: 22.9k stars, MIT license, 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins
68 PM skills + 42 chained workflows across 9 Claude Code plugins: pm-discovery, pm-strategy, pm-execution, pm-launch, pm-growth, pm-ai-features, pm-analytics, pm-learning, pm-dev-tools
Skills organized per-plugin with SKILL.md files under pm-<plugin>/skills/, plus commands/ directory with slash commands

Each plugin covers a PM domain: discovery (brainstorm-ideas, identify-assumptions, prioritize-assumptions, brainstorm-experiments, lean-validation, discover-opportunities, problem-framing-canvas, interview-guide, survey-design, jobs-to-be-done), strategy (opportunity-solution-tree, north-star-metrics, hypothesis-driven-backlog, write-prd, strategy-canvas, portfolio-vision, pricing-model, business-model-canvas), execution (create-prd, user-stories, sprint-plan, retro, brainstorm-okrs, prioritization-frameworks, outcome-roadmap, pre-mortem, stakeholder-map, summarize-meeting, test-scenarios, wwas, job-stories, release-notes, dummy-dataset), launch (plan-launch, launch-checklist, ship-check, go-to-market, positioning-statement, messaging-framework, competitive-intel, launch-retro, beta-program), growth (growth-model, a-b-test-plan, growth-experiment, funnel-analysis, retention-analysis, activation-plan, referral-program, lifecycle-email), AI features (ai-feature-launch, ai-feature-scope, ai-prompt-design, ai-model-selection, ai-evaluation, ai-incident-response, data-strategy, responsible-ai-review, ai-metrics, ai-cost-optimization)
Uses Teresa Torres, Marty Cagan, Alberto Savoia frameworks encoded as agent workflows
Companion repos: pm-brain, burnstop, claude-usage
Created 2026-03-01, last push 2026-07-03, 2 releases (latest v2.1.0)

license.evidence: LICENSE file in repo root; README badge confirms MIT

sources.name: PM Skills (Product on Purpose)
evidence: 449 stars, Apache-2.0 license, 5 contributors, 63 releases (latest v2.31.0 2026-07-06)
68 plug-and-play, best-practice PM skills: 30 Triple Diamond phase skills + 11 foundation + 12 utility + 15 tool (Foundation Sprint + Design Sprint)
Every skill follows Agent Skills spec: SKILL.md + references/TEMPLATE.md + references/EXAMPLE.md
Strict frontmatter schema with CI enforcement: name, description, version, updated, license, phase/classification fields

Phase skills cover complete Triple Diamond lifecycle: Discover (interview-synthesis, competitive-analysis, stakeholder-summary), Define (problem-statement, hypothesis, opportunity-tree, jtbd-canvas), Develop (solution-brief, spike-summary, adr, design-rationale), Deliver (prd, user-stories, acceptance-criteria, release-strategy, api-contract, technical-spec), Measure (success-metrics, analytics-plan, a-b-test-design, metric-tree, health-dashboard, experiment-doc), Iterate (retro-facilitation, insight-synthesis, pivot-assess, backlog-health)

Foundation skills: persona, okr-writer, lean-canvas, meeting-lifecycle, stakeholder-update, stakeholder-briefings, prioritized-action-plan, team-charter, decision-log, risk-register, communication-plan

Utility skills: pm-skill-builder, skill-validator, diagram-builder, slideshow-builder, library-index, changelog-curator, critique, release-conductor, workflow-builder, workflow-runner, chain-runner, context-builder
Plus 6 sub-agents, 200+ real-world output samples, learning guides, CI-enforced contracts
Created 2026-01-09, last push 2026-07-07 — actively maintained with rapid release cadence
